evidence.notes: Demo packet: stacked open signals suggest field context review only—not permit, owner, or tax conclusions.

confidence.recommendation_block_reason: Synthetic open-signal stack; field verification required; no regulatory or revenue action from EO/footprints alone.

recommended_review_action: Dispatch a non-enforcement field context visit to validate built form, access, and local explanations (vegetation, informal construction mapping gaps).

review_prompts: Could spectral change be explained by agriculture, monsoon green-up, clouds, or bare soil—not new built-up?
Are OSM or open footprints systematically incomplete in informal or dense settlements?
What on-site observations would confirm or reject a new built-up interpretation?
when_not_to_act: Do not infer permit compliance or tax liability from remote sensing and open footprints alone.
Do not publish owner identity or sensitive registry data to broad dashboards.
Do not treat change scores as proof of illegal construction.

safety_gates.message: Field verification and authorized local process required before any regulatory or revenue claim.
Earth-observation proxies require seasonality and cloud QA before high-priority operational use.

verification_questions: Visually confirm whether built-up extent changed versus last known state or imagery.
Note informal or unmapped structures that open footprints may miss.
Capture geotagged photos and site context; flag if vegetation or land clearing explains EO signals.
